notes: No live record data could be retrieved for Jacqueline Elizabeth Chattin (PE1239 / 345JW) via web search. The PA DOC Inmate Locator (inmatelocator.cor.pa.gov), VINELink (vinelink.com), and PA SAVIN all require direct browser-based JavaScript interaction with authenticated or interactive lookups — they do not expose individual inmate records in publicly crawlable search results. No third-party indexed record for this individual was found. To get a confirmed current status, query inmatelocator.cor.pa.gov directly by inmate number PE1239, search VINELink at vinelink.com for Pennsylvania by name or offender ID, or call PA SAVIN at 1-866-972-7284.
